name: Baked Applesauce
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 cups cooking apples, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the apples and peel off the skin.
2. Core the apples and cut them into 1-inch cubes.
3. Combine all ingredients in a glass loaf dish.
4. Pour the juice mixture over the top of the apple pieces.
5. Place the dish in a preheated oven set to 325 F.
6. Bake for 45 minutes, uncovered.
7. Remove from the oven and allow it to cool.
8. Store tightly covered in the refrigerator. This recipe can also be frozen. It makes 2 cups.
